attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.B2B_MESSAGE_ID, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.MESSAGE_PRIORITY, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.PARTNER_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.STATUS_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.ORDER_NUMBER, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.ORIGIN_AIRPORT_CODE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.DESTINATION_AIRPORT_CODE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.COUNTRY_EXP_IMP, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.EXPECTED_ARRIVAL_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.STATUS_MET_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.CITY_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.COUNTRY_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.STATE_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.MASTER_AIRWAY_BILL, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.HOUSE_AIRWAY_BILL, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.CARRIER_REFERENCE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SHIP_VIA, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.FLIGHT_NUMBER, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.NUMBER_OF_PIECES, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.RECEIVING_CUSTOMER_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SHIPMENT_GROSS_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SHIPMENT_DIM_WEIGHT, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.DIMENSION_HEIGHT, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.DIMENSION_LENGTH, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.DIMENSION_WIDTH, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.TRACKING_NUMBER, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.RECORD_STATUS, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.ERROR_MESSAGE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.CONCURRENT_PROGRAM_REQUEST, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.ID, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.RRN_EXISTS_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.R12_PROCESSED, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
  $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF,
  (
 select B2B_MESSAGE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF
 minus
 select B2B_MESSAGE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IFCE
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.B2B_MESSAGE_ID = STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.B2B_MESSAGE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_SCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IF.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_DV_3B3_SHPSTAT_IFACE)
